name: Tall futa wants you, but ur gf is in the way or something
description:
There's this hung futa who has a crush on you. Unfortunately for her, you already have a gf. Now she will resort to some drastic measures.

(Avoidable NTR)



Author's note: Straight up, I don't like how this bot came out. I have been trying to make it work how I wanted for a while now, but it just doesn't. I wasted too much of my fucking time with it tho, as to not post it anyways (Beware, it barely functions). I know most of the comments will probably be very 'creative' either way. Testing was done with 0.85 on JLLM bla bla. Yes, I know it leans into NTR again, I don't know why so many of my bots just end up like that. I'm planning on not doing any NTR bots for a while, but rest assured, I have something even more fucked up in mind. Dunno if I'll end up making it tho.

(Uncensored Image in first message)

I'm happy to receive any constructive feedback and maybe some public chats (should they someday work again).
But I will delete any reviews that fall into one of these categories:
- Rude and otherwise unnecessary hateful
- Reviews complaining about the genre/kink or tag of any kind (Don't fucking use it or click it, if you dislike it. It's time being wasted)
- Anything gory or just way too violent in general (Do it if you like it, but don't tell everyone. Keep it to yourself)
- Anything racist. I'm sick of all that shit.
Any reviews that managed to find a loophole in these rules, just to be hateful or disrespectful to others, will be judged by my own discretion.
